requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R600a handling and charge documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R600a处理与充注量文件
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R600a處理與充注量文件

summary.en: Peruvian technical requirements for imported household refrigerators generally inherit global IEC-derived safety logic on flammable refrigerants through INACAL-aligned NTP structures. R600a remains the common refrigerator refrigerant. Export models should keep clear documentation of refrigerant type, total charge, safety notices, and service guidance in Spanish where required for the market.
summary.zh: 秘鲁对进口家用冰箱的技术要求通常沿用INACAL对接的IEC体系条款，R600a仍是常见制冷剂。出口型号应在文件中明确制冷剂种类、总充注量、安全注意事项和维修说明，必要时提供西班牙语版本。
summary.zht: 秘魯對進口家用冰箱的技術要求通常沿用INACAL對接的IEC體系條款，R600a仍是常見製冷劑。出口型號應在文件中明確製冷劑種類、總充注量、安全注意事項和維修說明，必要時提供西班牙語版本。

standards_or_laws: INACAL-adopted NTP safety clauses for appliances using flammable refrigerants
Peru technical documentation expectations for refrigerant-bearing products
MTPE/occupational handling references where applicable to workplaces and service safety

summary.en: China standards for household appliances include refrigerant charge safety references within GB 4706.13 and related refrigeration safety documents, including flammability considerations. China does not have a direct Peru-equivalent documentary route for Peru market clearance, so Chile-style charge values in China certificates are not automatically accepted.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具安全体系（如GB 4706.13）包含制冷剂充注量和可燃性相关条款，但仅适用于中国体系。中国证书中的充注量值或测试结论不能自动用于秘鲁放行。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具安全體系（如GB 4706.13）包含製冷劑充注量和可燃性相關條款，但僅適用於中國體系。中國證書中的充注量值或測試結論不能自動用於秘魯放行。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 and related refrigeration safety references
China Refrigeration industry practice for R600a charge controls
CCC safety certification context under CNCA/SAMR

gap.en: The practical gap is usually documentary and model-specific. Exporters must align Peru-facing manuals and labels to include refrigerant ID and charge for the exact Peruvian configuration. Products with HFCs should be separately checked against Peru import scope and any climate-policy program applicable to refrigerants.
gap.zh: 实际差距通常在文件和具体型号层面。出口商需确保秘鲁方向文件和标签中包含制冷剂识别及型号对应充注量。若有HFC型号，应按秘鲁适用范围及相关气候政策程序单独核查。
gap.zht: 實際差距通常在文件和具體型號層面。出口商需確保秘魯方向文件和標籤中包含製冷劑識別及型號對應充注量。若有HFC型號，應按秘魯適用範圍及相關氣候政策程序單獨核查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory to provide complete refrigerant-type and charge documentation for Peru-facing market placement, especially for flammable-media appliances
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic safety compliance under GB frameworks; not an automatic Peru clearance substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R600a is commonly acceptable in Peru-facing refrigerator programs, but Peru compliance remains documentation-driven. Confirm refrigerant declaration and charge values for each exported model in Spanish-aligned commercial and technical files.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R600a在秘鲁相关冰箱方向通常可接受，但秘鲁合规仍以文件为核心。应按每个出口型号确认制冷剂声明和充注量，并在商业与技术文件中同步西班牙语要素。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R600a在秘魯相關冰箱方向通常可接受，但秘魯合規仍以文件為核心。應按每個出口型號確認製冷劑聲明和充注量，並在商業與技術文件中同步西班牙語要素。
